Talent Acquisition Manager | KPMG Auckland, NZ | Auckland, NZ | July 2020 – Present

details.title: Talent Acquisition Manager
bullets: Oversee recruitment and hiring for new employees in KPMG’s Auckland office
Manage team of three, including conducting annual reviews and taking responsibility for team KPIs
Serve on diversity, equity, and inclusion committee to ensure all voices are heard

content.text: Associate, Campus Recruiting | Goldman Sachs Remote | July 2020 – July 2022

details.title: Associate, Campus Recruiting
bullets: Liaised with colleges and universities to establish pipeline into finance and operations roles at Goldman Sachs for recent graduates
Recruited remotely and on campuses, answering questions and facilitating connections between hiring managers and prospective applicants
Tasked with major data analysis projects, including revamping recruitment schedules and frequency of events during COVID-19 pandemic

content.text: Middle School History Teacher | Nelson College Nelson, NZ | Nelson, NZ | August 2014 – June 2016

details.title: Middle School History Teacher
bullets: Taught levels 2-3 Classics and levels 1-3 History at New Zealand’s oldest state secondary school
Assistant coached rugby team, helping develop students’ physical well-being and mental toughness
Performed dorm responsibilities for boarding students, including routine wellness checks, floor-wide bonding activities, and conflict resolution when necessary

content.text: Cashier / Manager | LSU Sport Shop Baton Rouge, LA | Baton Rouge, LA | January 2011 – May 2014

details.title: Cashier / Manager
details.organization: LSU Sport Shop Baton Rouge, LA
bullets: Worked at the official gift and merchandise shopping center of LSU athletics
Sold apparel, assisted customers, and emphasized school spirit; promoted to manager for senior year

content.text: Fulbright English Teaching Assistant | U.S. Department of State – Fulbright Program Medan, Indonesia | Medan, Indonesia | August 2016 – April 2017

details.title: Fulbright English Teaching Assistant
details.organization: U.S. Department of State – Fulbright Program Medan, Indonesia
bullets: Developed and taught English language classes at a public secondary school
Participated in Indonesian language classes, improving my ability to communicate with locals and immerse myself in local culture
Organized pen pal program between Indonesian high schoolers and high schoolers from Baton Rouge, LA

content.text: Teaching Fellow: “Higher Education and the Law” | Harvard University Graduate School of Education Cambridge, MA | Cambridge, MA | January 2021 – May 2021

details.title: Teaching Fellow: “Higher Education and the Law”
details.organization: Harvard University Graduate School of Education Cambridge, MA
bullets: Assisted professor Phil Catanzano with lesson-planning, grading, and course management during remote offering of “Higher Education and the Law”

content.text: Equity and Inclusion Fellow | Harvard University Graduate School of Education Cambridge, MA | Cambridge, MA | September 2019 – May 2020

details.title: Equity and Inclusion Fellow
details.organization: Harvard University Graduate School of Education Cambridge, MA
bullets: Selected to be one of twenty Equity and Inclusion Fellows (EIF)
Completed field placement work with Boston Public Schools’ central office
Worked alongside cohort of driven educators who shared a commitment to equity in education
